title: obione minuscula
intro: Obione minuscula, also known as beach evening primrose, is a coastal perennial plant that belongs to the primrose family and is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Obione minuscula include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Obione minuscula can be made into infusions, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
